hypothesis: In a ternary Ar/O2/He plasma etching system, augmenting the proposed GraphSAGE model with physics-derived edge features that encode pairwise interaction propensities (e.g., reaction counts or estimated cross-sections between species) will increase etch-rate prediction R2 by at least 0.05 on unseen operating conditions compared to the current node-only implementation, without retraining the single-gas predictors.
